title: Final review of epic 0gg diff
description: Review the integrated epic diff before close-out (run a reviewer subagent for the substantial parts — the landing.ts rewrite and swarm visual). Checks: (1) zero 'tk run' anywhere on the site/docs; (2) honesty — no specific model-tier names, cloud sync presented as opt-in, no 'no cloud at all' overclaim, every command shown exists in the cobra command set; (3) both pillars present and balanced; (4) above-the-fold differentiators (cost/tier, parallel+worktrees, git/no-backend) actually above the fold; (5) cd cloud/worker && pnpm exec tsc --noEmit clean on the integrated tree; (6) /docs route resolves. Resolve or route any findings before the close-out tick unblocks.
acceptance_criteria: Full epic diff reviewed; copy claims checked for honesty (no hardcoded model names, cloud=opt-in, every shown command real); worker tsc clean on integrated tree; findings resolved or routed
